items.title: Lana Del Rey Shares Update On Stove… And Companion Album?!
items.summary: Lana Del Rey has been frequently teasing and pushing back her follow-up to 2023's Did You Know That There's a Tunnel Under Ocean Blvd for more than two years now. When she first announced it at a Grammys party in 2024, it was called Lasso and billed as a country album.

items.title: Mallory Hawk – “Four O’Clocks”
items.summary: Former Customer frontwoman Mallory Hawk's debut solo album Chinook is named after the military helicopters that dotted the skies around her childhood hometown. That town factors directly into "Four O'Clocks," the pensive and pretty new single she released today. Let Hawk explain: The post Mallory Hawk – “Four O’Clocks” appeared first on Stereogum.
